TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_nipaluma-palungacay,_palongacay, title = nipaluma-palungacay,_palongacay, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/nipaluma-palungacay,_palongacay} }

S.FORM: == palungacay, palongacay ÁčĻÁď£ŚÖęšĽôŤäĪ == masa dumaay a ngangan Hydrangea angustipetala Hayata (mitesekay a ngangan) Hydrangea angustipetala Hayata ŤôéŤÄ≥ŤćČÁßĎ (sapamataan a ngangan)Saxifragaceae ŚÖęšĽôŤäĪŚĪ¨ (mikeliday tu ngangan)bashianhua nu langawan ŚłłŚĪĪ,Á™ĄÁď£ÁĻ°ÁźÉ (tada ngangan)charngsan, tzerbann-shiowchyou Hydrangea angustipetala hayata (igu a ngangan)Hydrangea angustipetala hayata ŚłÉŤĺ≤ Vavau Makuis Tu Puah,śííŚ•áŤźäťõÖ Palongacay,ťĄí Vungavung Aaru Rapi'i (kamu nu binacadan)BununŚłÉŤĺ≤ Vavau Makuis Tu Puah,SakidayaśííŚ•áŤźäťõÖ Palongacay,CoťĄí Vungavung Aaru Rapi'i ŚłÉŤĺ≤,śííŚ•áŤźäťõÖ,ťĄí (mitaduay nu binacadan)Bunun, Sakidya, Co kaliwasak nu langaw itda i jong-gwo, liou-chyou, Taywan nu langawan han i teban nu dadipasan ahebalay nu papahay atu kilangkilangan nu mililisay tu bayu a kitidaan. Palongacay manamuh tu cilal, lidunglidungan, sengedsengedan, kapah mala sasangaan tu aadihan nu luma' atu papalumaan i luma' nu langawan. (kamu nu Hulam:śĖľšł≠Śúč,ÁźČÁźÉ, .) sasapayuan kananaman nu sanek: lamit, papah: kala aledahan, cilemin, sapi', adidi ku ledek. lamid han milawpes tu ledek, teluhu', miputun tu akuti', mingaay tu malaliya, malebawa ku baluwan bili, masa alitaday nu baeng, sakay hekal han saki tamusi, papah sakay ngaluh, kawseiya. (kamu nu Hulam: . .) milihida tu langaw musakamuh palongacay u palongacay a apuyuay ku akaway nu kilang, langaw han makaala tu tusa a lasubu-sepat a lasubu a cong-fen, yadah ku ciit, mangaduay a ciitan idaw ku banuh. papah masasuala' tu akaway, kasienawan mahetik ku papah, duhepicku papah, satanayu' sa ku papah lima ‚Äďsabaw tu tusa a cong-fen, ahebal han tusa ‚Äďsepat a cong-fen, masa dicem ku papah, na salusalusan ku wayway nu papah, kalawlawan langlangdawan ku kulit, sibanuh. balu adidi, u sasapalan iteban nu sasa'. balu han macebal, i tunduh, liklik nu balu nai ku sasapalan, sasemaan nu balu han idaw ku tuluay idaw ku sepatay, tabaki adidi atu wayway nu balu caay namin kalecad. palongacay a heci pela' sananay, mahida u mali, tanayu han 0.3-0.4 cong-fen. (kamu nu Hulam: .) singtan saiwse sanpudaw masaup namin ku sanglacay a baluan, mahida u sangalacay nu mabahelay nu aipapang, miliwliw tu cacaya a lalangawan a kalawlawan nu baluan mapalaw, alaw han u Palongacay a langawan-sanglacay a adipapang han, kasi baluan han i cacay ‚Äďenem a bulad, langaw nu talakaw han 1-3.5 cong-chyy. balu nu liwliw idaw ku sepatay nu sanglacay a sasemaan a kakicuhan a malabalu, mahida u sanglacay a adipapang. (kamu nu Hulam: .) mangalay apatayni tu cilekay micepcep tu adiping nu sicedam, sisa mala tusa ku balu nina langaw, cacay han usibiliay a balu, cacay han pacebaay a balu, Palongacay a balu, idaw kuni kawawada' tu kawaw. tebanay a baluan kalawlawan ku kulit, aadidi', caay ka bangcal ka tinengan ku adiping, nika mabeteli ku tamaan atu taynaan a adiping u sibiliay kuyda. duma i hekalay a liwyud han naiay ku bili nu baluan, naitu ku laheci nu masasuacawaay nu matabuay abalu, nika idaw ku pina a micedekay nu sanglacay a kakicuhan, baluan nu akaway adidi satanayu'sa i pabaw namin ku balu, wayway nu balu mahida u mapalaway i pabaw nu balu mapalaw nu adidiay a aipapang. palongacay u Taywan nu tada langaw, manamuh i dadipasan nu ahebalya a papahan a kitidaan, manamuh tu lidunglidungan, nika kilul sananay tusicilalay a kaki tidaan kapah aca ku langaw itida. (kamu nu Hulam: .) balu itunduh, masasuala tu langaw, akaway nu balu namaka akaway mala balu a tahekal, masasu acawaay a balu, adidi macebal kuyu balu, nu yadahay nika celalan nu balu, masilac macunus kuni ka cebalan. tatengaay a balu (masa acawaay a balu), kakicuh lima kuni kapelaan, sasemaan nu balu han lima ku sema', satanayusa madicem, pulu' ku tamaan a baluan caay kalecad ku tanayu, bluhan kalawlawan langlangdawan ku kulit, tulu ku tabakiay nu kakabitan, sapal han makimulmul. (kamu nu Hulam:ÁúüŤäĪ ;ŤźľÁČá5ťĹíŤ£ā,ŤäĪÁď£5śěö, .) caay kasi biliay a balu, akaway namaka taleacawaan nu akawayan hahuducen satanayusa, sepat ku sanglacay a tabakiay nu kakicuh, makimulmul, macebalsa ku cacaya a balu, tatengaay a baluhan miculimek i teban. (kamu nu Hulam: .) pela' sa ku heci mahida u mali, tunduh nu kakabitan nu balu han malatulu kadiceman. (kamu nu Hulam: .) akaway papah langaw masadid namin, yadah ku ciit, adidiay a ciit han langdaway ku kulit. masasula tu akaway ku papah, idaw ku akaway, masadid, satanayu'sa mahida u ti'kuk, masadicem, mamin ku papah, tanayu han makaala tu walu ‚Äď sabaw tusa a cung-fen, ahebal han makaala tu tusa- sepat a cung-fen. (kamu nu Hulam: ,ŚÖ®Á∑£,ťē∑ÁīĄ8~ 12c m,ŚĮ¨ÁīĄ2~ 4c m.) palongacay a langawan u masasu acawaay ku balu, i mihmihcaan tu tulu ‚Äďsepat a buladan, kasi baluan, isasa nu dadipasan nu buyuan silangaw, ahebalay nu papahan atu i dadanan, hinaadih kita tu bangcalay nu sanglacay nu baluan han, u palongacay a balu sakita, caay patelac. (kamu nu Hulam: .) u siwkay nu nipaluma u sanek nu nipaluma malaheci tu imelang pasubana i cacudadan a lacul u zuma a cidekay a kamu, saungay misapayu' a cidekay u sulit nu zuma a kamu-Hulam atu Amilika
S.PHON: == par~…ĺuŇča ¶aj, par~…ĺoŇča ¶aj ***** == masa dumaaj a ŇčaŇčan ńßjdraŇč…ôa aŇčustip…ôtar~…ĺa ńßajata (mit…ôs…ôkaj a ŇčaŇčan) ńßjdraŇč…ôa aŇčustip…ôtar~…ĺa ńßajata **** (sapamataan a ŇčaŇčan)sa*ifraga ¶…ôa…ô **** (mik…ôr~…ĺidaj tu ŇčaŇčan)basńßianńßua nu r~…ĺaŇčawan **,**** (tada ŇčaŇčan) ¶ńßarŇčsan, tz…ôrbann-sńßiow ¶ńßjou ńßjdraŇč…ôa aŇčustip…ôtar~…ĺa ńßajata (igu a ŇčaŇčan)ńßjdraŇč…ôa aŇčustip…ôtar~…ĺa ńßajata ** *a*au makuis tu puańß,**** par~…ĺoŇča ¶aj,* *uŇča*uŇč aaru *api Ē~ °i (kamu nu bina ¶adan)bunun** *a*au makuis tu puańß,sakidaja**** par~…ĺoŇča ¶aj, ¶o* *uŇča*uŇč aaru *api Ē~ °i **,****,* (mitaduaj nu bina ¶adan)bunun, sakidja, ¶o kar~…ĺiwasak nu r~…ĺaŇčaw itda i joŇč-gwo, r~…ĺiou- ¶ńßjou, tajwan nu r~…ĺaŇčawan ńßan i t…ôban nu dadipasan ańß…ôbar~…ĺaj nu papańßaj atu kir~…ĺaŇčkir~…ĺaŇčan nu mir~…ĺir~…ĺisaj tu baju a kitidaan. par~…ĺoŇča ¶aj manamuńß tu ¶ir~…ĺar~…ĺ, r~…ĺiduŇčr~…ĺiduŇčan, s…ôŇč…ôds…ôŇč…ôdan, kapańß mar~…ĺa sasaŇčaan tu aadińßan nu r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° atu papar~…ĺumaan i r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° nu r~…ĺaŇčawan. (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam:***,**, .) sasapajuan kananaman nu san…ôk: r~…ĺamit, papańß: kar~…ĺa ar~…ĺ…ôdańßan, ¶ir~…ĺ…ômin, sapi Ē~ °, adidi ku r~…ĺ…ôd…ôk. r~…ĺamid ńßan mir~…ĺawp…ôs tu r~…ĺ…ôd…ôk, t…ôr~…ĺuńßu Ē~ °, miputun tu akuti Ē~ °, miŇčaaj tu mar~…ĺar~…ĺija, mar~…ĺ…ôbawa ku bar~…ĺuwan bir~…ĺi, masa ar~…ĺitadaj nu ba…ôŇč, sakaj ńß…ôkar~…ĺ ńßan saki tamusi, papańß sakaj Ňčar~…ĺuńß, kaws…ôija. (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: . .) mir~…ĺińßida tu r~…ĺaŇčaw musakamuńß par~…ĺoŇča ¶aj u par~…ĺoŇča ¶aj a apujuaj ku akawaj nu kir~…ĺaŇč, r~…ĺaŇčaw ńßan makaar~…ĺa tu tusa a r~…ĺasubu-s…ôpat a r~…ĺasubu a ¶oŇč-f…ôn, jadańß ku ¶iit, maŇčaduaj a ¶iitan idaw ku banuńß. papańß masasuar~…ĺa Ē~ ° tu akawaj, kasi…ônawan mańß…ôtik ku papańß, duńß…ôpi ¶ku papańß, satanaju Ē~ ° sa ku papańß r~…ĺima *sabaw tu tusa a ¶oŇč-f…ôn, ańß…ôbar~…ĺ ńßan tusa *s…ôpat a ¶oŇč-f…ôn, masa di ¶…ôm ku papańß, na sar~…ĺusar~…ĺusan ku wajwaj nu papańß, kar~…ĺawr~…ĺawan r~…ĺaŇčr~…ĺaŇčdawan ku kur~…ĺit, sibanuńß. bar~…ĺu adidi, u sasapar~…ĺan it…ôban nu sasa Ē~ °. bar~…ĺu ńßan ma ¶…ôbar~…ĺ, i tunduńß, r~…ĺikr~…ĺik nu bar~…ĺu nai ku sasapar~…ĺan, sas…ômaan nu bar~…ĺu ńßan idaw ku tur~…ĺuaj idaw ku s…ôpataj, tabaki adidi atu wajwaj nu bar~…ĺu ¶aaj namin kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad. par~…ĺoŇča ¶aj a ńß…ô ¶i p…ôr~…ĺa Ē~ ° sananaj, mańßida u mar~…ĺi, tanaju ńßan *.*-*.* ¶oŇč-f…ôn. (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: .) siŇčtan saiws…ô sanpudaw masaup namin ku saŇčr~…ĺa ¶aj a bar~…ĺuan, mańßida u saŇčar~…ĺa ¶aj nu mabańß…ôr~…ĺaj nu aipapaŇč, mir~…ĺiwr~…ĺiw tu ¶a ¶aja a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan a kar~…ĺawr~…ĺawan nu bar~…ĺuan mapar~…ĺaw, ar~…ĺaw ńßan u par~…ĺoŇča ¶aj a r~…ĺaŇčawan-saŇčr~…ĺa ¶aj a adipapaŇč ńßan, kasi bar~…ĺuan ńßan i ¶a ¶aj *…ôn…ôm a bur~…ĺad, r~…ĺaŇčaw nu tar~…ĺakaw ńßan *-*.* ¶oŇč- ¶ńßjj. bar~…ĺu nu r~…ĺiwr~…ĺiw idaw ku s…ôpataj nu saŇčr~…ĺa ¶aj a sas…ômaan a kaki ¶uńßan a mar~…ĺabar~…ĺu, mańßida u saŇčr~…ĺa ¶aj a adipapaŇč. (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: .) maŇčar~…ĺaj apatajni tu ¶ir~…ĺ…ôkaj mi ¶…ôp ¶…ôp tu adipiŇč nu si ¶…ôdam, sisa mar~…ĺa tusa ku bar~…ĺu nina r~…ĺaŇčaw, ¶a ¶aj ńßan usibir~…ĺiaj a bar~…ĺu, ¶a ¶aj ńßan pa ¶…ôbaaj a bar~…ĺu, par~…ĺoŇča ¶aj a bar~…ĺu, idaw kuni kawawada Ē~ ° tu kawaw. t…ôbanaj a bar~…ĺuan kar~…ĺawr~…ĺawan ku kur~…ĺit, aadidi Ē~ °, ¶aaj ka baŇč ¶ar~…ĺ ka tin…ôŇčan ku adipiŇč, nika mab…ôt…ôr~…ĺi ku tamaan atu tajnaan a adipiŇč u sibir~…ĺiaj kujda. duma i ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj a r~…ĺiwjud ńßan naiaj ku bir~…ĺi nu bar~…ĺuan, naitu ku r~…ĺańß…ô ¶i nu masasua ¶awaaj nu matabuaj abar~…ĺu, nika idaw ku pina a mi ¶…ôd…ôkaj nu saŇčr~…ĺa ¶aj a kaki ¶uńßan, bar~…ĺuan nu akawaj adidi satanaju Ē~ °sa i pabaw namin ku bar~…ĺu, wajwaj nu bar~…ĺu mańßida u mapar~…ĺawaj i pabaw nu bar~…ĺu mapar~…ĺaw nu adidiaj a aipapaŇč. par~…ĺoŇča ¶aj u tajwan nu tada r~…ĺaŇčaw, manamuńß i dadipasan nu ańß…ôbar~…ĺja a papańßan a kitidaan, manamuńß tu r~…ĺiduŇčr~…ĺiduŇčan, nika kir~…ĺur~…ĺ sananaj tusi ¶ir~…ĺar~…ĺaj a kaki tidaan kapańß a ¶a ku r~…ĺaŇčaw itida. (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: .) bar~…ĺu itunduńß, masasuar~…ĺa tu r~…ĺaŇčaw, akawaj nu bar~…ĺu namaka akawaj mar~…ĺa bar~…ĺu a tańß…ôkar~…ĺ, masasu a ¶awaaj a bar~…ĺu, adidi ma ¶…ôbar~…ĺ kuju bar~…ĺu, nu jadańßaj nika ¶…ôr~…ĺar~…ĺan nu bar~…ĺu, masir~…ĺa ¶ ma ¶unus kuni ka ¶…ôbar~…ĺan. tat…ôŇčaaj a bar~…ĺu (masa a ¶awaaj a bar~…ĺu), kaki ¶uńß r~…ĺima kuni kap…ôr~…ĺaan, sas…ômaan nu bar~…ĺu ńßan r~…ĺima ku s…ôma Ē~ °, satanajusa madi ¶…ôm, pur~…ĺu Ē~ ° ku tamaan a bar~…ĺuan ¶aaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad ku tanaju, br~…ĺuńßan kar~…ĺawr~…ĺawan r~…ĺaŇčr~…ĺaŇčdawan ku kur~…ĺit, tur~…ĺu ku tabakiaj nu kakabitan, sapar~…ĺ ńßan makimur~…ĺmur~…ĺ. (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam:** ;*****,****, .) ¶aaj kasi bir~…ĺiaj a bar~…ĺu, akawaj namaka tar~…ĺ…ôa ¶awaan nu akawajan ńßańßudu ¶…ôn satanajusa, s…ôpat ku saŇčr~…ĺa ¶aj a tabakiaj nu kaki ¶uńß, makimur~…ĺmur~…ĺ, ma ¶…ôbar~…ĺsa ku ¶a ¶aja a bar~…ĺu, tat…ôŇčaaj a bar~…ĺuńßan mi ¶ur~…ĺim…ôk i t…ôban. (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: .) p…ôr~…ĺa Ē~ ° sa ku ńß…ô ¶i mańßida u mar~…ĺi, tunduńß nu kakabitan nu bar~…ĺu ńßan mar~…ĺatur~…ĺu kadi ¶…ôman. (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: .) akawaj papańß r~…ĺaŇčaw masadid namin, jadańß ku ¶iit, adidiaj a ¶iit ńßan r~…ĺaŇčdawaj ku kur~…ĺit. masasur~…ĺa tu akawaj ku papańß, idaw ku akawaj, masadid, satanaju Ē~ °sa mańßida u ti Ē~ °kuk, masadi ¶…ôm, mamin ku papańß, tanaju ńßan makaar~…ĺa tu war~…ĺu * sabaw tusa a ¶uŇč-f…ôn, ańß…ôbar~…ĺ ńßan makaar~…ĺa tu tusa- s…ôpat a ¶uŇč-f…ôn. (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: ,**,***~ ** ¶ m,***~ * ¶ m.) par~…ĺoŇča ¶aj a r~…ĺaŇčawan u masasu a ¶awaaj ku bar~…ĺu, i mińßmińß ¶aan tu tur~…ĺu *s…ôpat a bur~…ĺadan, kasi bar~…ĺuan, isasa nu dadipasan nu bujuan sir~…ĺaŇčaw, ańß…ôbar~…ĺaj nu papańßan atu i dadanan, ńßinaadińß kita tu baŇč ¶ar~…ĺaj nu saŇčr~…ĺa ¶aj nu bar~…ĺuan ńßan, u par~…ĺoŇča ¶aj a bar~…ĺu sakita, ¶aaj pat…ôr~…ĺa ¶. (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: .) u siwkaj nu nipar~…ĺuma u san…ôk nu nipar~…ĺuma mar~…ĺańß…ô ¶i tu im…ôr~…ĺaŇč pasubana i ¶a ¶udadan a r~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ u zuma a ¶id…ôkaj a kamu, sauŇčaj misapaju Ē~ ° a ¶id…ôkaj u sur~…ĺit nu zuma a kamu-ńßur~…ĺam atu amir~…ĺika
S.FORM: == palungacay, palongacay ÁčĻÁď£ŚÖęšĽôŤäĪ == masa dumaay a ngangan Hydrangea angustipetala Hayata (mitesekay a ngangan) Hydrangea angustipetala Hayata ŤôéŤÄ≥ŤćČÁßĎ (sapamataan a ngangan)Saxifragaceae ŚÖęšĽôŤäĪŚĪ¨ (mikeliday tu ngangan)bashianhua nu langawan ŚłłŚĪĪ,Á™ĄÁď£ÁĻ°ÁźÉ (tada ngangan)charngsan, tzerbann-shiowchyou Hydrangea angustipetala hayata (igu a ngangan)Hydrangea angustipetala hayata ŚłÉŤĺ≤ Vavau Makuis Tu Puah,śííŚ•áŤźäťõÖ Palongacay,ťĄí Vungavung Aaru Rapi'i (kamu nu binacadan)BununŚłÉŤĺ≤ Vavau Makuis Tu Puah,SakidayaśííŚ•áŤźäťõÖ Palongacay,CoťĄí Vungavung Aaru Rapi'i ŚłÉŤĺ≤,śííŚ•áŤźäťõÖ,ťĄí (mitaduay nu binacadan)Bunun, Sakidya, Co kaliwasak nu langaw itda i jong-gwo, liou-chyou, Taywan nu langawan han i teban nu dadipasan ahebalay nu papahay atu kilangkilangan nu mililisay tu bayu a kitidaan. Palongacay manamuh tu cilal, lidunglidungan, sengedsengedan, kapah mala sasangaan tu aadihan nu luma' atu papalumaan i luma' nu langawan. (kamu nu Hulam:śĖľšł≠Śúč,ÁźČÁźÉ, .) sasapayuan kananaman nu sanek: lamit, papah: kala aledahan, cilemin, sapi', adidi ku ledek. lamid han milawpes tu ledek, teluhu', miputun tu akuti', mingaay tu malaliya, malebawa ku baluwan bili, masa alitaday nu baeng, sakay hekal han saki tamusi, papah sakay ngaluh, kawseiya. (kamu nu Hulam: . .) milihida tu langaw musakamuh palongacay u palongacay a apuyuay ku akaway nu kilang, langaw han makaala tu tusa a lasubu-sepat a lasubu a cong-fen, yadah ku ciit, mangaduay a ciitan idaw ku banuh. papah masasuala' tu akaway, kasienawan mahetik ku papah, duhepicku papah, satanayu' sa ku papah lima ‚Äďsabaw tu tusa a cong-fen, ahebal han tusa ‚Äďsepat a cong-fen, masa dicem ku papah, na salusalusan ku wayway nu papah, kalawlawan langlangdawan ku kulit, sibanuh. balu adidi, u sasapalan iteban nu sasa'. balu han macebal, i tunduh, liklik nu balu nai ku sasapalan, sasemaan nu balu han idaw ku tuluay idaw ku sepatay, tabaki adidi atu wayway nu balu caay namin kalecad. palongacay a heci pela' sananay, mahida u mali, tanayu han 0.3-0.4 cong-fen. (kamu nu Hulam: .) singtan saiwse sanpudaw masaup namin ku sanglacay a baluan, mahida u sangalacay nu mabahelay nu aipapang, miliwliw tu cacaya a lalangawan a kalawlawan nu baluan mapalaw, alaw han u Palongacay a langawan-sanglacay a adipapang han, kasi baluan han i cacay ‚Äďenem a bulad, langaw nu talakaw han 1-3.5 cong-chyy. balu nu liwliw idaw ku sepatay nu sanglacay a sasemaan a kakicuhan a malabalu, mahida u sanglacay a adipapang. (kamu nu Hulam: .) mangalay apatayni tu cilekay micepcep tu adiping nu sicedam, sisa mala tusa ku balu nina langaw, cacay han usibiliay a balu, cacay han pacebaay a balu, Palongacay a balu, idaw kuni kawawada' tu kawaw. tebanay a baluan kalawlawan ku kulit, aadidi', caay ka bangcal ka tinengan ku adiping, nika mabeteli ku tamaan atu taynaan a adiping u sibiliay kuyda. duma i hekalay a liwyud han naiay ku bili nu baluan, naitu ku laheci nu masasuacawaay nu matabuay abalu, nika idaw ku pina a micedekay nu sanglacay a kakicuhan, baluan nu akaway adidi satanayu'sa i pabaw namin ku balu, wayway nu balu mahida u mapalaway i pabaw nu balu mapalaw nu adidiay a aipapang. palongacay u Taywan nu tada langaw, manamuh i dadipasan nu ahebalya a papahan a kitidaan, manamuh tu lidunglidungan, nika kilul sananay tusicilalay a kaki tidaan kapah aca ku langaw itida. (kamu nu Hulam: .) balu itunduh, masasuala tu langaw, akaway nu balu namaka akaway mala balu a tahekal, masasu acawaay a balu, adidi macebal kuyu balu, nu yadahay nika celalan nu balu, masilac macunus kuni ka cebalan. tatengaay a balu (masa acawaay a balu), kakicuh lima kuni kapelaan, sasemaan nu balu han lima ku sema', satanayusa madicem, pulu' ku tamaan a baluan caay kalecad ku tanayu, bluhan kalawlawan langlangdawan ku kulit, tulu ku tabakiay nu kakabitan, sapal han makimulmul. (kamu nu Hulam:ÁúüŤäĪ ;ŤźľÁČá5ťĹíŤ£ā,ŤäĪÁď£5śěö, .) caay kasi biliay a balu, akaway namaka taleacawaan nu akawayan hahuducen satanayusa, sepat ku sanglacay a tabakiay nu kakicuh, makimulmul, macebalsa ku cacaya a balu, tatengaay a baluhan miculimek i teban. (kamu nu Hulam: .) pela' sa ku heci mahida u mali, tunduh nu kakabitan nu balu han malatulu kadiceman. (kamu nu Hulam: .) akaway papah langaw masadid namin, yadah ku ciit, adidiay a ciit han langdaway ku kulit. masasula tu akaway ku papah, idaw ku akaway, masadid, satanayu'sa mahida u ti'kuk, masadicem, mamin ku papah, tanayu han makaala tu walu ‚Äď sabaw tusa a cung-fen, ahebal han makaala tu tusa- sepat a cung-fen. (kamu nu Hulam: ,ŚÖ®Á∑£,ťē∑ÁīĄ8~ 12c m,ŚĮ¨ÁīĄ2~ 4c m.) palongacay a langawan u masasu acawaay ku balu, i mihmihcaan tu tulu ‚Äďsepat a buladan, kasi baluan, isasa nu dadipasan nu buyuan silangaw, ahebalay nu papahan atu i dadanan, hinaadih kita tu bangcalay nu sanglacay nu baluan han, u palongacay a balu sakita, caay patelac. (kamu nu Hulam: .) u siwkay nu nipaluma u sanek nu nipaluma malaheci tu imelang pasubana i cacudadan a lacul u zuma a cidekay a kamu, saungay misapayu' a cidekay u sulit nu zuma a kamu-Hulam atu Amilika
S.PHON: == par~…ĺuŇča ¶aj, par~…ĺoŇča ¶aj ***** == masa dumaaj a ŇčaŇčan ńßjdraŇč…ôa aŇčustip…ôtar~…ĺa ńßajata (mit…ôs…ôkaj a ŇčaŇčan) ńßjdraŇč…ôa aŇčustip…ôtar~…ĺa ńßajata **** (sapamataan a ŇčaŇčan)sa*ifraga ¶…ôa…ô **** (mik…ôr~…ĺidaj tu ŇčaŇčan)basńßianńßua nu r~…ĺaŇčawan **,**** (tada ŇčaŇčan) ¶ńßarŇčsan, tz…ôrbann-sńßiow ¶ńßjou ńßjdraŇč…ôa aŇčustip…ôtar~…ĺa ńßajata (igu a ŇčaŇčan)ńßjdraŇč…ôa aŇčustip…ôtar~…ĺa ńßajata ** *a*au makuis tu puańß,**** par~…ĺoŇča ¶aj,* *uŇča*uŇč aaru *api Ē~ °i (kamu nu bina ¶adan)bunun** *a*au makuis tu puańß,sakidaja**** par~…ĺoŇča ¶aj, ¶o* *uŇča*uŇč aaru *api Ē~ °i **,****,* (mitaduaj nu bina ¶adan)bunun, sakidja, ¶o kar~…ĺiwasak nu r~…ĺaŇčaw itda i joŇč-gwo, r~…ĺiou- ¶ńßjou, tajwan nu r~…ĺaŇčawan ńßan i t…ôban nu dadipasan ańß…ôbar~…ĺaj nu papańßaj atu kir~…ĺaŇčkir~…ĺaŇčan nu mir~…ĺir~…ĺisaj tu baju a kitidaan. par~…ĺoŇča ¶aj manamuńß tu ¶ir~…ĺar~…ĺ, r~…ĺiduŇčr~…ĺiduŇčan, s…ôŇč…ôds…ôŇč…ôdan, kapańß mar~…ĺa sasaŇčaan tu aadińßan nu r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° atu papar~…ĺumaan i r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° nu r~…ĺaŇčawan. (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam:***,**, .) sasapajuan kananaman nu san…ôk: r~…ĺamit, papańß: kar~…ĺa ar~…ĺ…ôdańßan, ¶ir~…ĺ…ômin, sapi Ē~ °, adidi ku r~…ĺ…ôd…ôk. r~…ĺamid ńßan mir~…ĺawp…ôs tu r~…ĺ…ôd…ôk, t…ôr~…ĺuńßu Ē~ °, miputun tu akuti Ē~ °, miŇčaaj tu mar~…ĺar~…ĺija, mar~…ĺ…ôbawa ku bar~…ĺuwan bir~…ĺi, masa ar~…ĺitadaj nu ba…ôŇč, sakaj ńß…ôkar~…ĺ ńßan saki tamusi, papańß sakaj Ňčar~…ĺuńß, kaws…ôija. (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: . .) mir~…ĺińßida tu r~…ĺaŇčaw musakamuńß par~…ĺoŇča ¶aj u par~…ĺoŇča ¶aj a apujuaj ku akawaj nu kir~…ĺaŇč, r~…ĺaŇčaw ńßan makaar~…ĺa tu tusa a r~…ĺasubu-s…ôpat a r~…ĺasubu a ¶oŇč-f…ôn, jadańß ku ¶iit, maŇčaduaj a ¶iitan idaw ku banuńß. papańß masasuar~…ĺa Ē~ ° tu akawaj, kasi…ônawan mańß…ôtik ku papańß, duńß…ôpi ¶ku papańß, satanaju Ē~ ° sa ku papańß r~…ĺima *sabaw tu tusa a ¶oŇč-f…ôn, ańß…ôbar~…ĺ ńßan tusa *s…ôpat a ¶oŇč-f…ôn, masa di ¶…ôm ku papańß, na sar~…ĺusar~…ĺusan ku wajwaj nu papańß, kar~…ĺawr~…ĺawan r~…ĺaŇčr~…ĺaŇčdawan ku kur~…ĺit, sibanuńß. bar~…ĺu adidi, u sasapar~…ĺan it…ôban nu sasa Ē~ °. bar~…ĺu ńßan ma ¶…ôbar~…ĺ, i tunduńß, r~…ĺikr~…ĺik nu bar~…ĺu nai ku sasapar~…ĺan, sas…ômaan nu bar~…ĺu ńßan idaw ku tur~…ĺuaj idaw ku s…ôpataj, tabaki adidi atu wajwaj nu bar~…ĺu ¶aaj namin kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad. par~…ĺoŇča ¶aj a ńß…ô ¶i p…ôr~…ĺa Ē~ ° sananaj, mańßida u mar~…ĺi, tanaju ńßan *.*-*.* ¶oŇč-f…ôn. (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: .) siŇčtan saiws…ô sanpudaw masaup namin ku saŇčr~…ĺa ¶aj a bar~…ĺuan, mańßida u saŇčar~…ĺa ¶aj nu mabańß…ôr~…ĺaj nu aipapaŇč, mir~…ĺiwr~…ĺiw tu ¶a ¶aja a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan a kar~…ĺawr~…ĺawan nu bar~…ĺuan mapar~…ĺaw, ar~…ĺaw ńßan u par~…ĺoŇča ¶aj a r~…ĺaŇčawan-saŇčr~…ĺa ¶aj a adipapaŇč ńßan, kasi bar~…ĺuan ńßan i ¶a ¶aj *…ôn…ôm a bur~…ĺad, r~…ĺaŇčaw nu tar~…ĺakaw ńßan *-*.* ¶oŇč- ¶ńßjj. bar~…ĺu nu r~…ĺiwr~…ĺiw idaw ku s…ôpataj nu saŇčr~…ĺa ¶aj a sas…ômaan a kaki ¶uńßan a mar~…ĺabar~…ĺu, mańßida u saŇčr~…ĺa ¶aj a adipapaŇč. (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: .) maŇčar~…ĺaj apatajni tu ¶ir~…ĺ…ôkaj mi ¶…ôp ¶…ôp tu adipiŇč nu si ¶…ôdam, sisa mar~…ĺa tusa ku bar~…ĺu nina r~…ĺaŇčaw, ¶a ¶aj ńßan usibir~…ĺiaj a bar~…ĺu, ¶a ¶aj ńßan pa ¶…ôbaaj a bar~…ĺu, par~…ĺoŇča ¶aj a bar~…ĺu, idaw kuni kawawada Ē~ ° tu kawaw. t…ôbanaj a bar~…ĺuan kar~…ĺawr~…ĺawan ku kur~…ĺit, aadidi Ē~ °, ¶aaj ka baŇč ¶ar~…ĺ ka tin…ôŇčan ku adipiŇč, nika mab…ôt…ôr~…ĺi ku tamaan atu tajnaan a adipiŇč u sibir~…ĺiaj kujda. duma i ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj a r~…ĺiwjud ńßan naiaj ku bir~…ĺi nu bar~…ĺuan, naitu ku r~…ĺańß…ô ¶i nu masasua ¶awaaj nu matabuaj abar~…ĺu, nika idaw ku pina a mi ¶…ôd…ôkaj nu saŇčr~…ĺa ¶aj a kaki ¶uńßan, bar~…ĺuan nu akawaj adidi satanaju Ē~ °sa i pabaw namin ku bar~…ĺu, wajwaj nu bar~…ĺu mańßida u mapar~…ĺawaj i pabaw nu bar~…ĺu mapar~…ĺaw nu adidiaj a aipapaŇč. par~…ĺoŇča ¶aj u tajwan nu tada r~…ĺaŇčaw, manamuńß i dadipasan nu ańß…ôbar~…ĺja a papańßan a kitidaan, manamuńß tu r~…ĺiduŇčr~…ĺiduŇčan, nika kir~…ĺur~…ĺ sananaj tusi ¶ir~…ĺar~…ĺaj a kaki tidaan kapańß a ¶a ku r~…ĺaŇčaw itida. (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: .) bar~…ĺu itunduńß, masasuar~…ĺa tu r~…ĺaŇčaw, akawaj nu bar~…ĺu namaka akawaj mar~…ĺa bar~…ĺu a tańß…ôkar~…ĺ, masasu a ¶awaaj a bar~…ĺu, adidi ma ¶…ôbar~…ĺ kuju bar~…ĺu, nu jadańßaj nika ¶…ôr~…ĺar~…ĺan nu bar~…ĺu, masir~…ĺa ¶ ma ¶unus kuni ka ¶…ôbar~…ĺan. tat…ôŇčaaj a bar~…ĺu (masa a ¶awaaj a bar~…ĺu), kaki ¶uńß r~…ĺima kuni kap…ôr~…ĺaan, sas…ômaan nu bar~…ĺu ńßan r~…ĺima ku s…ôma Ē~ °, satanajusa madi ¶…ôm, pur~…ĺu Ē~ ° ku tamaan a bar~…ĺuan ¶aaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad ku tanaju, br~…ĺuńßan kar~…ĺawr~…ĺawan r~…ĺaŇčr~…ĺaŇčdawan ku kur~…ĺit, tur~…ĺu ku tabakiaj nu kakabitan, sapar~…ĺ ńßan makimur~…ĺmur~…ĺ. (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam:** ;*****,****, .) ¶aaj kasi bir~…ĺiaj a bar~…ĺu, akawaj namaka tar~…ĺ…ôa ¶awaan nu akawajan ńßańßudu ¶…ôn satanajusa, s…ôpat ku saŇčr~…ĺa ¶aj a tabakiaj nu kaki ¶uńß, makimur~…ĺmur~…ĺ, ma ¶…ôbar~…ĺsa ku ¶a ¶aja a bar~…ĺu, tat…ôŇčaaj a bar~…ĺuńßan mi ¶ur~…ĺim…ôk i t…ôban. (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: .) p…ôr~…ĺa Ē~ ° sa ku ńß…ô ¶i mańßida u mar~…ĺi, tunduńß nu kakabitan nu bar~…ĺu ńßan mar~…ĺatur~…ĺu kadi ¶…ôman. (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: .) akawaj papańß r~…ĺaŇčaw masadid namin, jadańß ku ¶iit, adidiaj a ¶iit ńßan r~…ĺaŇčdawaj ku kur~…ĺit. masasur~…ĺa tu akawaj ku papańß, idaw ku akawaj, masadid, satanaju Ē~ °sa mańßida u ti Ē~ °kuk, masadi ¶…ôm, mamin ku papańß, tanaju ńßan makaar~…ĺa tu war~…ĺu * sabaw tusa a ¶uŇč-f…ôn, ańß…ôbar~…ĺ ńßan makaar~…ĺa tu tusa- s…ôpat a ¶uŇč-f…ôn. (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: ,**,***~ ** ¶ m,***~ * ¶ m.) par~…ĺoŇča ¶aj a r~…ĺaŇčawan u masasu a ¶awaaj ku bar~…ĺu, i mińßmińß ¶aan tu tur~…ĺu *s…ôpat a bur~…ĺadan, kasi bar~…ĺuan, isasa nu dadipasan nu bujuan sir~…ĺaŇčaw, ańß…ôbar~…ĺaj nu papańßan atu i dadanan, ńßinaadińß kita tu baŇč ¶ar~…ĺaj nu saŇčr~…ĺa ¶aj nu bar~…ĺuan ńßan, u par~…ĺoŇča ¶aj a bar~…ĺu sakita, ¶aaj pat…ôr~…ĺa ¶. (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: .) u siwkaj nu nipar~…ĺuma u san…ôk nu nipar~…ĺuma mar~…ĺańß…ô ¶i tu im…ôr~…ĺaŇč pasubana i ¶a ¶udadan a r~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ u zuma a ¶id…ôkaj a kamu, sauŇčaj misapaju Ē~ ° a ¶id…ôkaj u sur~…ĺit nu zuma a kamu-ńßur~…ĺam atu amir~…ĺika
